name: AI Real Estate Sales Employee - MVP (with Memory)

nodes.name: 1. Lead Intake (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Website chat widget aur WhatsApp Business API dono is URL par POST karenge. Body: { source, name, phone, message, session_id }

nodes.name: 2b. Fetch Conversation History
nodes.notes: Ek naya sheet tab banao naam 'Conversations' with columns: session_id, history_json, updated_at. Agar session_id nahi milta to yeh node empty result dega — aage wala Code node isko handle karta hai (naya conversation start ho jayega).

nodes.name: 3. AI Conversation + Qualification
nodes.notes: HTTP Request node directly OpenAI API ko call karta hai taake poora messages array (memory ke sath) bhej sakein — n8n ka default OpenAI node isko easily nahi karta.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "temperature": 0, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You extract structured lead data from a real estate sales conversation. Return STRICT JSON ONLY, no prose, no markdown fences. Schema: {\"intent\":\"buy|rent|invest|unknown\",\"area\":\"string|unknown\",\"property_type\":\"apartment|villa|townhouse|unknown\",\"budget_aed\":number|0,\"timeline\":\"immediate|3_months|exploring|unknown\",\"payment_method\":\"cash|mortgage|unknown\",\"ready_to_qualify\":true|false}. Set ready_to_qualify=true only if at least intent, area, and budget_aed are known." }, { "role": "user", "content": JSON.stringify($('2c. Build Message Array (with Memory)').item.json.messages) } ] } }}

nodes.name: 4. Extract Structured Data
nodes.notes: HTTP Request node use kiya (openAi wrapper node ki jagah) taake purane n8n versions mein bhi kaam kare.

nodes.name: 6. Save to CRM (Google Sheet)
nodes.notes: Sheet 'Leads' mein yeh columns headers ke roop mein pehle se bana lo: session_id, customer_name, phone, source, intent, area, property_type, budget_aed, timeline, payment_method, lead_score, lead_tier, timestamp, status

nodes.name: 8a. WhatsApp Alert to Agent
nodes.notes: MVP mein agar WhatsApp Business API setup nahi hua to iski jagah 'Send Email' node use karo (Gmail node), zyada tez shuru ho jayega.

parameters.subject: =🔥 HOT LEAD: {{ $json.customer_name }} - Score {{ $json.lead_score }}/100

nodes.name: 8b. Email Alert to Agent (Fallback)
nodes.notes: Simplest option to start with — use this instead of node 8a if WhatsApp API isn't set up yet.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "temperature": 0.5, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "Write a short, warm WhatsApp message (2-3 sentences, in the customer's language) confirming that a property consultant will contact them shortly about their request. Do not invent specific property names or prices." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Customer wants: " + $json.property_type + " in " + $json.area + ", budget AED " + $json.budget_aed + ", intent " + $json.intent } ] } }}

nodes.name: 9. Generate Customer Confirmation
nodes.notes: HTTP Request node use kiya (openAi wrapper node ki jagah) taake purane n8n versions mein bhi kaam kare.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "reply": $json.choices[0].message.content, "lead_score": $('5. Calculate Lead Score').item.json.lead_score, "lead_tier": $('5. Calculate Lead Score').item.json.lead_tier } }}

meta.description: MVP workflow WITH conversation memory: Website/WhatsApp lead -> fetch prior conversation history -> AI conversation (context-aware) -> save updated history -> extract structured data -> lead scoring -> CRM save -> hot lead alert to agent -> customer confirmation.
